title: Detecting anomalies on conveyor belts
content:
## Project Structure
⦁	_**Input Layer:**_ Video stream / Camera (OpenCV) 
⦁	**_Preprocessing:_** Image resizing, ROI (Region of Interest), filtering 
⦁	**_Reference-Based Detection:_** Image comparison using difference and SSIM (Structural Similarity Index) 
⦁	**_Anomaly Detection Output:_** OK / NOK decision 
⦁	**_Data Storage:_** Save anomaly images (raw dataset) 
⦁	**_Data Labeling:_** Manual classification (tear, burn, abrasion, normal, false alarm) 
⦁	**_Machine Learning Module:_** CNN model using TensorFlow / Keras 
⦁	**_Model Output:_** Classification of anomaly type 
⦁	Future Extensions: Dashboard, real-time monitoring, alert system

![Image description](https://dev-to-uploads.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/articles/kjhqfam9d56jx6v1g9la.jpeg)
